title: 4 reports, 53 people and multiple sightings around Brasília-DF [1994]

text_preview:
Between 18:00 and 21:42 on February 2nd, 1994, 53 people from 4 different locations in the Distrito Federal region observed an unidentified flying object moving very slowly, and sometimes remaining stationary.

The reported sightings were made from:  Novo Cruzeiro district in Brasília-DF; Cidade Ocidental-GO; Gama Oeste-DF; and Valparaíso-GO.

– 20 people in Cruzeiro Novo, Brasília, Distrito Federal, between 18:00 and 18:30, observed an unknown object in the shape of a “stretched binocular, changing position in an East-South direction” at high altitude. According to the witness who reported th
summary: On Feb 2, 1994, 53 people at 4 sites around Brasília-DF reported slow or stationary multicolor UFOs between 18:00 and 21:42.
